name: Petula Clark
abstract: Sally "Petula" Clark (born 15 November 1932) is a British singer, actress, and songwriter. She started her professional career as a child performer and is still active more than 80 years later.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: There'll Be Another Spring: A Tribute to Miss Peggy Lee
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Lorraine Feather
about_quotes.evidence: The other gig I had in that period of time was with Petula Clark in Vegas.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lorraine Feather interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 22, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Lou Pallo
about_quotes.evidence: I had to do a rhythm section thing on that with Tony Hatch... So that was, and that was my first experience doing a recording session with strings.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lou Pallo interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 14, 2007

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Coleman
about_quotes.evidence: At the same festival there were Petula Clark and Charles Aznavour who did not have much fame at that time.
